productDisplayName: Lucera Women Gold Pendant with Chain
description: Style Notelucera, or ‘luminous star’ in Spanish, is designed for fashionistas who like to shine! Lucera fashion jewellery offers contemporary designs to complement the various moods of the modern and fashion conscious woman of today.Product DetailsA diamond shaped gold plated silver pendant with encrusted CZ diamonds and a purple stone in the centreThis pendant comes with a chain and the design of the chain might slightly vary.Material and CareSilverWipe with a damp swob to remove dust
